notes: You can get to the main menu, then to character select screen. In the character creation screen the character seems completely black, and if you manage to make the character, clicking "Enter" will make the game crash on loading.
title: Lucent Heart

notes:
Patch tool works, intro works, server screen and news works, character screen works both to select character and to make a new one. Clicking enter to start the game goes to a loading screen which completes but then crashes. Tried all the 'tweaks' individually, but none helped. Noticed some errors in log about D3D shaders "24777.492:0067:00a2:warn:debugstr:OutputDebugStringA "NiBinaryShaderLib> DLLMain CALL - "
24777.492:0067:00a2:trace:seh:raise_exception code=40010006 flags=0 addr=0x7b4520df ip=7b4520df tid=00a2", no idea if that means anything.
title: Lucent Heart
